examples: The boss pouched all the money.
She wears a dress pouched over a belt.
She pouched her lips at her father's words.
Victory came only after a last-over wobble that saw Trott pouched by Gary Keedy, before Ant Botha was run out.
Solanki and Darren Maddy made decent enough progress, picking up sixes each before the latter was pouched at mid-on off Irfan Pathan.
